glosses.ja: 肉屋; と畜場の作業員

sentences.target: Der Fleischhauer schneidet das Fleisch sehr dünn.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈflaɪ̯ʃhaʊ̯ɐ ˈʃnaɪ̯dət das flaɪ̯ʃ zeːɐ̯ dʏn/

translations.de: Der Fleischhauer schneidet das Fleisch sehr dünn.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈflaɪ̯ʃhaʊ̯ɐ ˈʃnaɪ̯dət das flaɪ̯ʃ zeːɐ̯ dʏn/
translations.en: The butcher cuts the meat very thin.
translations.es: El carnicero corta la carne muy fina.
translations.fr: Le boucher coupe la viande très finement.
translations.it: Il macellaio taglia la carne molto sottile.
translations.ko: 정육점 주인이 고기를 아주 얇게 썰어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 肉铺师傅把肉切得很薄。
translations.yue: 肉檔師傅將啲肉切得好薄。
translations.pt: O açougueiro corta a carne bem fina.
translations.he: הקצב חותך את הבשר דק מאוד.
translations.vi: Người bán thịt thái thịt rất mỏng.
translations.nl: De slager snijdt het vlees heel dun.
translations.hu: A hentes nagyon vékonyra vágja a húst.
translations.hi: कसाई मांस को बहुत पतला काटता है.
translations.el: Ο χασάπης κόβει το κρέας πολύ λεπτά.
translations.id: Tukang daging memotong daging sangat tipis.
translations.ja: 肉屋が肉をとても薄く切ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun.
Common noun; masculine; subject of the clause (agent).
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; predicates the cutting action.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular; determines the object noun.
Common noun; neuter; direct object of the verb.
Degree adverb; intensifies the following adjective.
Adjective used adverbially; describes the manner of cutting (thinly).

sentences.target: Ich frage den Fleischhauer nach frischer Leber.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːgə deːn ˈflaɪ̯ʃhaʊ̯ɐ naːx ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈleːbɐ/

translations.de: Ich frage den Fleischhauer nach frischer Leber.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːgə deːn ˈflaɪ̯ʃhaʊ̯ɐ naːx ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈleːbɐ/
translations.en: I ask the butcher for fresh liver.
translations.es: Le pido al carnicero hígado fresco.
translations.fr: Je demande au boucher du foie frais.
translations.it: Chiedo al macellaio del fegato fresco.
translations.ko: 저는 정육점 주인에게 신선한 간을 달라고 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向肉铺师傅要新鲜的肝。
translations.yue: 我問肉檔師傅有冇新鮮嘅肝。
translations.ru: Я прошу у мясника свежую печень.
translations.pt: Eu peço ao açougueiro fígado fresco.
translations.vi: Tôi xin người bán thịt gan tươi.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de slager om verse lever.
translations.uk: Я прошу в м’ясника свіжу печінку.
translations.hi: मैं कसाई से ताज़ा कलेजी माँगता हूँ.
translations.el: Ζητάω από τον χασάπη φρέσκο συκώτι.
translations.nb: Jeg ber slakteren om fersk lever.
translations.id: Saya minta hati segar pada tukang daging.
translations.sv: Jag ber slaktaren om färsk lever.
translations.da: Jeg beder slagteren om frisk lever.
translations.ja: 私は肉屋に新鮮なレバーを頼みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determines the person asked.
Common noun; masculine; direct object (the person being asked).
Preposition governing dative; introduces the topic sought ('ask for').
Attributive adjective; dative feminine singular; modifies 'Leber'.
Common noun; feminine; object of the preposition 'nach' (prepositional complement).

sentences.target: Mein Onkel arbeitet als Fleischhauer in Linz.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈɔŋkl̩ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət als ˈflaɪ̯ʃhaʊ̯ɐ ɪn lɪnts/

translations.de: Mein Onkel arbeitet als Fleischhauer in Linz.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈɔŋkl̩ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət als ˈflaɪ̯ʃhaʊ̯ɐ ɪn lɪnts/
translations.en: My uncle works as a butcher in Linz.
translations.es: Mi tío trabaja de carnicero en Linz.
translations.fr: Mon oncle travaille comme boucher à Linz.
translations.it: Mio zio lavora como macellaio a Linz.
translations.ko: 제 삼촌은 린츠에서 정육점 일을 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我叔叔在林茨当肉铺师傅。
translations.yue: 我叔叔喺林茨做肉檔師傅。
translations.ru: Мой дядя работает мясником в Линце.
translations.pt: Meu tio trabalha como açougueiro em Linz.
translations.vi: Chú tôi làm nghề bán thịt ở Linz.
translations.nl: Mijn oom werkt als slager in Linz.
translations.uk: Мій дядько працює м’ясником у Лінці.
translations.hi: मेरा चाचा लिंज़ में कसाई का काम करता है.
translations.pl: Mój wujek pracuje jako rzeźnik w Linzu.
translations.el: Ο θείος μου δουλεύει ως χασάπης στο Λιντς.
translations.nb: Onkelen min jobber som slakter i Linz.
translations.id: Paman saya bekerja sebagai tukang daging di Linz.
translations.sv: Min farbror arbetar som slaktare i Linz.
translations.ro: Unchiul meu lucrează ca măcelar în Linz.
translations.cs: Můj strýc pracuje jako řezník v Linci.
translations.da: Min onkel arbejder som slagter i Linz.
translations.ja: おじはリンツで肉屋として働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Onkel'.
Common noun; masculine; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing a role/profession; governs a bare nominal complement.
Common noun; predicative complement indicating role/profession.
Preposition governing dative here; introduces a locative phrase.
Proper noun; city name; object of the preposition 'in' (location).

sentences.target: Ich treffe dich später beim Fleischhauer.

translations.de: Ich treffe dich später beim Fleischhauer.
translations.en: I’ll meet you later at the butcher’s.
translations.es: Te veo más tarde en la carnicería.
translations.fr: Je te retrouve plus tard chez le boucher.
translations.it: Ci vediamo più tardi dal macellaio.
translations.ru: Я встречу тебя позже у мясной лавки.
translations.pt: Eu te encontro mais tarde no açougue.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ gặp bạn sau ở tiệm thịt.
translations.nl: Ik zie je later bij de slager.
translations.uk: Я зустріну тебе пізніше в м’ясній крамниці.
translations.hi: मैं तुमसे बाद में कसाई की दुकान पर मिलूँगा.
translations.pl: Spotkam się z tobą później u rzeźnika.
translations.el: Θα σε συναντήσω αργότερα στο κρεοπωλείο.
translations.nb: Jeg møter deg senere hos slakteren.
translations.id: Saya akan menemuimu nanti di toko daging.
translations.sv: Jag möter dig senare hos slaktaren.
translations.ro: Ne vedem mai târziu la măcelărie.
translations.cs: Sejdu se s tebou později u řezníka.
translations.da: Jeg mødes med dig senere hos slagteren.
translations.ja: あとで肉屋で会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular.
Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular accusative; direct object.

Contraction of 'bei dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative phrase.
Common noun; masculine; object of the preposition 'bei' (location: at the butcher's).
